title: Code injection in CSVAgent: user-controlled customReadCSV interpolated into Python executed by Pyodide
description: The CSVAgent node (CSVAgent.ts) in Flowise <= 3.0.13 builds a Python program by string-interpolating the user-controlled customReadCSV input (customReadCSVFunc) directly into the code template at 'df = pd.${customReadCSVFunc}' (line 158) and immediately executes it with pyodide.runPythonAsync(code) (line 162). Because there is no sanitization or validation of customReadCSVFunc, an authenticated attacker who configures a chatflow with this node can supply a payload such as DataFrame({'foo': ['bar!']});import os;os.system('whoami') that is interpolated and executed by the Pyodide Python runtime, yielding arbitrary code/command execution (RCE) when the chatflow is triggered via /api/v1/prediction.
